---
title: "Drivers of Lasting Streaming Performance"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by **the ggmutants** For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Greg Chism. The team is comprised of the following team members.

- Team member 1: Mike Stanton, a healthcare analyst with a background in music who couldn't handle the heat in Arizona and recently moved to Maryland.
